data.reason: initialize params.capabilities must be an object
initialize params.capabilities.tools.listChanged must be a boolean
initialize params.capabilities.roots must be an object

tools.description: Locate the latest dated backlog document from an index or backlog directory.

backlog_dir_path.description: Fallback backlog directory to scan for dated markdown files.

work_backlog_index_path.description: Backlog index markdown file whose links point to dated backlog files.

tools.name: latest_backlog

tools.description: Inspect markdown files and report missing required metadata fields.

doc_dir_path.description: Root directory whose markdown files will be scanned.

tools.name: check_doc_metadata

tools.description: Inspect markdown relative links and report broken targets.

doc_dir_path.description: Root directory whose markdown files will be scanned for broken links.

tools.name: check_doc_links

tools.description: Suggest impacted workflow documents from changed files and summary input.

changed_files.description: Changed file paths that should be classified into impacted document candidates.

latest_backlog_path.description: Optional latest backlog document to include as an impacted state document.

session_handoff_path.description: Optional session handoff document to include as an impacted state document.

work_backlog_index_path.description: Optional backlog index document to include as an impacted state document.

tools.name: suggest_impacted_docs

tools.description: Generate a draft backlog entry JSON for a new task.

status.description: Initial status of the task (default: planned).

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task (e.g., TASK-001).

task_name.description: Short descriptive name of the task.

tools.name: create_backlog_entry

tools.description: Generate a draft session handoff document from the latest backlog.

git_summary.description: Optional git summary text to include in the handoff.

latest_backlog_path.description: Latest dated backlog document to extract task status from.

tools.name: create_session_handoff_draft

tools.description: Generate a draft environment record stub for the current host.

os_type.description: Current OS type (e.g., darwin, linux, windows).

tools.name: create_environment_record_stub

tools.description: Check quickstart and README entry docs for stale or missing links.

agents_path.description: Optional AGENTS or harness guidance document expected to be linked from entry docs.

project_profile_path.description: Optional project profile document expected to be linked from entry docs.

quickstart_paths.description: One or more quickstart or README entry documents to inspect.

session_handoff_path.description: Optional session handoff document expected to be linked from entry docs.

work_backlog_index_path.description: Optional backlog index document expected to be linked from entry docs.

tools.name: check_quickstart_stale_links

tools.description: Summarize git commit history into categories and markdown for handoff.
tools.name: summarize_git_history

tools.description: Rotate old done items from handoff into baseline to prevent bloat.

handoff_path.description: Path to the session handoff document.

max_done_items.description: Maximum number of done items to keep in 'recently done' (default: 10).

tools.name: rotate_workflow_logs

tools.description: Analyze milestone progress based on maturity matrix and backlog.

backlog_path.description: Path to the current backlog document.

matrix_path.description: Path to the maturity matrix JSON.

tools.name: assess_milestone_progress

tools.description: Extract specific function or class blocks from a Python file to reduce LLM context bloat.

symbols.description: List of function or class names to extract. If empty, all are extracted.

tools.name: smart_context_reader

tools.description: Apply a robust Search-Replace block patch to a file with fuzzy matching and syntax validation.

patch_content.description: The SEARCH/REPLACE block content (using <<<<<<< SEARCH, =======, >>>>>>> REPLACE).

tools.name: apply_robust_patch

data.error: payload JSON 이 read-only bundle input schema 와 맞지 않는다.

request must be a JSON object
initialize must be called before tools/list in stdio session mode
